A

addAlbum(String, String, int, int) - Method in class MusicArtist
creates an album and adds it to the artist's discography
addEntry(Media) - Method in class Library
add new media entry to library
Album - Class in <Unnamed>
represents the album of a music artist
Album(String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class Album
Constructs a new album.

C

COMPLETED - Status
 

D

displayAlbums() - Method in class MusicArtist
prints each album of the artist, as well as the progress and status of the album
displayArtists() - Method in class Library
displays all music artists currently in the library
displayFilteredResults(ArrayList<Media>) - Static method in class Interface
displays the filtered media entries
displayGames() - Method in class Library
displays all videogames currently in the library
displayInfo() - Method in class Album
displays a summary of the album
displayInfo() - Method in class Media
display a summary of media entry
displayInfo() - Method in class Movie
displays a summary of the movie info
displayInfo() - Method in class MusicArtist
displays a summary of artist info
displayInfo() - Method in class Videogame
displays a summary of videogame info
displayMovies() - Method in class Library
displays all movies currently in the library
displayProfile(Profile, String[], String[], String[]) - Static method in class Interface
displays profile
displaySummary() - Method in class Library
display summary of the library.
displayTitle() - Static method in class Interface
displays media vault title
divider1() - Static method in class Interface
divider
divider2() - Static method in class Interface
2nd divider
Driver - Class in <Unnamed>
 
Driver() - Constructor for class Driver
 

F

filterByStatus(Status) - Method in class Library
filter media entries by status
filterByType(String) - Method in class Library
filter media entries by type
findAlbum(String) - Method in class MusicArtist
find album in artist's discography using title
findEntry(String, String) - Method in class Library
finds the media entry in the library
fromChoice(String) - Static method in enum Status
is used for the menu in the interface

G

getAlbums() - Method in class MusicArtist
get the albums of the artist
getBio() - Method in class Profile
get bio of profile
getDescription() - Method in class Movie
get description of the movie
getDescription() - Method in class MusicArtist
get description of the artist
getDescription() - Method in class Videogame

getDeveloper() - Method in class Videogame

getDirector() - Method in class Movie
get director of the movie
getDisplay() - Method in enum Status
gets the display
getDisplayName() - Method in class Profile
get display name of profile
getEntries() - Method in class Library
get all media entries in library
getGenre() - Method in class Album
get the genre of the album
getHoursPlayed() - Method in class Videogame
get how many hours played
getInputStatus(Scanner) - Static method in class Interface
display status menu and get input for status

display status menu(when initially adding media entry) and get input
getIntInput(Scanner, String) - Static method in class Interface
prompt user until it gives a valid integer
getLibrary() - Method in class Profile
get library of profile
getMediaTypeChoice(Scanner) - Static method in class Interface
display media type menu selection and get input
getMovie() - Method in class Media
get the movie object
getMusicArtist() - Method in class Media
get the MusicArtist object
getName() - Method in class MusicArtist
get name of the artist
getProgress() - Method in class MusicArtist
get how many of the albums are completed
getRating() - Method in class Media
get rating of media entry
getRecentArtistDiscography(String) - Method in class Library
get the top 3 recent artist discography
getRecentTitles(String) - Method in class Library
get the top 3 recent titles in the library
getReview() - Method in class Media
get review of the media entry
getSongsListened() - Method in class Album
get the number of songs the user has listened to
getStatus() - Method in class Media
get media status
getTitle() - Method in class Album
get the title of the album
getTitle() - Method in class Media
get the title/name of the movie, videogame, or music artist based on media type
getTitle() - Method in class Movie
get title of the movie
getTitle() - Method in class Videogame
get title of the videogame
getTrackCount() - Method in class Album
get the track count of the album
getType() - Method in class Media
get Media type
getUsername() - Method in class Profile
get username of profile
getVideogame() - Method in class Media
get the Videogame object
getYear() - Method in class Album
get the year when the album released
getYear() - Method in class Movie
get year when movie released
getYear() - Method in class Videogame
get year when videogame released

I

IN_PROGRESS - Status
 
Interface - Class in <Unnamed>
 
Interface() - Constructor for class Interface
 
isCompleted() - Method in class Album
checks whether an album is completed, meaning songs listened is equal to the track count
isCompleted() - Method in class MusicArtist
checks whether all albums of the artist is completed

L

Library - Class in <Unnamed>
manages a list of media entry objects

libraryMenu(Scanner) - Static method in class Interface
displays library menu and gets input for menu

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Driver
 
Media - Class in <Unnamed>
represents all the media types and where ratings and reviews happen

constructs a movie media entry

set status of the media entry.
setTitle(String) - Method in class Album

set title of the movie
setTitle(String) - Method in class Videogame
set title of the videogame
setTrackCount(int) - Method in class Album

setYear(int) - Method in class Album
change the year of the album
setYear(int) - Method in class Movie
set year when movie released
setYear(int) - Method in class Videogame
set year when videogame released
Status - Enum in <Unnamed>
represents the status of a media, which are planned, in progress, and completed

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum Status
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum Status
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

represents a videogame entry
